hero.subtitle: We build production-grade AI infrastructure that captures, scales, and operationalizes expert knowledge across your organization.

services.heading: End-to-end AI capabilities
services.subtitle: From strategy to production. We design, build, and operate AI systems that solve real problems.
services.consultingDesc: Actionable roadmaps for AI adoption. We assess your operations, identify high-impact opportunities, and design implementation strategies that deliver measurable ROI.
services.agentsDesc: Autonomous agents that execute multi-step workflows, make decisions within defined guardrails, and integrate with your existing systems.
services.skillsDesc: Custom AI capabilities built for your domain. We encode your processes, standards, and decision frameworks into reusable AI skill modules.
services.infraDesc: Scalable, secure, production-grade infrastructure for AI deployment. From model serving to monitoring, built with DevSecOps principles.
services.ragDesc: Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipelines that ground AI responses in your organization's actual data, documents, and institutional knowledge.

coreProduct.description: An AI layer that augments your engineering experts. Capture what they know, make it reusable across teams, and ensure every response is reliable, traceable, and aligned with proven expertise.
coreProduct.captureDesc: Automatically extract and structure expert knowledge from projects, decisions, and technical discussions.
coreProduct.consistentDesc: Ensure every team member has access to the same quality of analysis and decision-making frameworks.
coreProduct.decisionDesc: AI-assisted analysis grounded in your organization's historical data, standards, and proven methodologies.
coreProduct.scaleDesc: Multiply your best engineers' impact. Expert-level thinking available to every team, every project, every decision.

howItWorks.heading: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: A proven methodology for turning expert knowledge into scalable AI systems.
howItWorks.mapDesc: We analyze your domain, processes, and expert knowledge to identify what to capture and systematize.
howItWorks.buildDesc: We architect AI systems tailored to your workflows — agents, skills, knowledge pipelines, and integrations.
howItWorks.deployDesc: Production-grade deployment with security, monitoring, and observability built in from day one.
howItWorks.scaleDesc: Expand across teams and use cases. Continuous learning ensures the system improves with every interaction.

whyUs.heading: Built different
whyUs.subtitle: We combine deep AI expertise with engineering discipline. The result: AI systems you can actually trust in production.
whyUs.standardsDesc: We build AI systems the way critical infrastructure is built: tested, documented, version-controlled, and auditable.
whyUs.securityDesc: Every AI decision is logged, traceable, and explainable. Full audit trails for compliance-sensitive environments.
whyUs.devopsDesc: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, automated testing, and security scanning baked into every AI deployment.
whyUs.productionDesc: Not prototypes. Not demos. We ship AI systems that run in production, handle edge cases, and scale under load.
whyUs.reliableDesc: Responses grounded in your data, your standards, your expertise. No hallucinations. No generic outputs.
whyUs.domainDesc: We don't bolt generic AI onto your workflow. We build AI that understands your domain from the ground up.

callToAction.description: Book a discovery call with our engineering team. We'll assess your needs and show you exactly how AI can transform your operations.
callToAction.labelMessage: What are you looking to build?
callToAction.placeholderMessage: Brief description of your AI needs...
callToAction.successMessage: Our team will reach out within 24 hours to schedule your discovery call.
callToAction.disclaimer: No commitment required. We respond within 24 hours.
callToAction.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.brandDescription: Production-grade AI systems built with engineering discipline. We turn expert knowledge into scalable intelligence.

chat.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm Honto's AI assistant. I can answer questions about our services, how we work, or help you book a demo. What would you like to know?
chat.responseServices:
We offer five core services:

**AI Consulting & Strategy** — Roadmaps for AI adoption with measurable ROI.
**AI Agents** — Autonomous workflows that integrate with your systems.
**Domain-Specific AI Skills** — Custom AI capabilities for your exact processes.
**AI Infrastructure** — Scalable, secure deployment with DevSecOps.
**RAG & Knowledge Systems** — AI grounded in your organization's actual data.

Would you like to dive deeper into any of these?
chat.responseBooking:
I'd be happy to help you book a demo! You can use the scheduling section below, or I can connect you directly with our team.

Just share your **name**, **company**, and **preferred time**, and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
chat.responseProcess:
Our process has four phases:

**1. Map** — We analyze your domain expertise and workflows.
**2. Build** — We architect AI systems tailored to your needs.
**3. Deploy** — Production-grade deployment with security built in.
**4. Scale** — Expand across teams with continuous improvement.

Every engagement starts with a discovery session. Want to schedule one?
chat.responseProduct:
Our **Expert Intelligence Platform** is an AI layer that augments your engineering experts. It captures institutional knowledge, makes it reusable, and ensures every AI response is reliable, traceable, and aligned with your proven expertise.

Think of it as giving every team member access to your best engineer's thinking.
chat.responseSecurity:
Security is foundational, not an afterthought:

- Full audit trails for every AI decision
- DevSecOps pipelines with automated security scanning
- Infrastructure as code with hardened configurations
- Compliance-ready logging and traceability

We build AI systems the way critical infrastructure is built.
chat.responsePricing:
Pricing depends on scope, complexity, and integration requirements. We work on both project-based and retainer models.

The best way to get accurate pricing is to **book a discovery call** where we can understand your specific needs. Shall I help set that up?
chat.responseFallback:
That's a great question. For the most detailed answer, I'd recommend speaking with one of our AI engineers directly.

Would you like to **book a demo** or learn more about our **services** or **process**?

caseStudiesPage.heading: Systems we've built
caseStudiesPage.subtitle: Real-world AI infrastructure designed for production. Each project represents our commitment to engineering-grade standards, security, and operational excellence.
caseStudiesPage.bulwarkSubtitle: Open-source governance layer for AI agents
caseStudiesPage.bulwarkDescription: A security-first middleware that sits between AI agents and external tools — enforcing policies, managing credentials, inspecting content, and maintaining tamper-evident audit trails.

bulwark.title: Bulwark
bulwark.subtitle: Open-source governance layer for AI agents
bulwark.description: AI agents are powerful but ungoverned. They can access any tool, leak any credential, and leave no audit trail. Bulwark sits between AI agents and external tools — enforcing policies, managing credentials, inspecting content, and maintaining a complete, tamper-evident audit trail. One policy governs all your agents.
bulwark.challengeDescription: When AI agents interact with payment processors, compliance systems, privacy-sensitive APIs, and regulated infrastructure, the stakes are existential. A single leaked credential or unauthorized API call can trigger regulatory violations, data breaches, and financial loss.
bulwark.problemCredentialDetail: Agents receive raw API keys and tokens, with no boundary between access and exposure.
bulwark.problemPolicyDetail: Every agent has implicit access to every tool. No per-agent, per-session, or per-operator controls.
bulwark.problemContentDetail: Sensitive data flows through agent pipelines unscanned — PII, secrets, and injection attacks pass unchecked.
bulwark.problemAuditDetail: When something goes wrong, there is no verifiable record of what happened, when, or why.
bulwark.capabilitiesSubtitle: Every request passes through a multi-stage pipeline. Each layer enforces a different security boundary.
bulwark.capPolicyDesc: YAML-based rules control which tools agents can use. Glob patterns, scope-based precedence (global/operator/session), priority ordering, and hot-reload without restart.
bulwark.capCredentialDesc: Agents never see real secrets. Bulwark injects credentials at the last mile before tool invocation. Encrypted at rest using age encryption.
bulwark.capInspectionDesc: 13 built-in detection patterns scan for AWS keys, GitHub tokens, private keys, PII, and prompt injection. Automatic blocking or redaction.
bulwark.capAuditDesc: Every action recorded in a tamper-evident SQLite database with Blake3 hash chains. Real-time tailing, search, export, and cryptographic verification.
bulwark.capRateLimitDesc: Token-bucket rate limits per session, operator, tool, or globally. Cost tracking with budget enforcement to prevent runaway spending.
bulwark.capMcpDesc: Works as an MCP gateway (stdio or HTTP) or HTTP forward proxy. Governance metadata attached to every tool call response.
bulwark.architectureSubtitle: Every agent interaction flows through a deterministic, auditable pipeline before reaching upstream tools.
bulwark.pipelineResponseNote: Response path mirrors the pipeline in reverse — content inspection and audit logging on every response.
bulwark.integrationSubtitle: Bulwark adapts to your agent architecture. Local development, remote multi-agent systems, or legacy HTTP clients — one governance layer handles all.
bulwark.rustSubtitle: A modular Rust workspace where each security boundary is its own crate — independently testable, auditable, and replaceable.
bulwark.approachDescription: Bulwark represents Honto's philosophy in practice: production-grade AI infrastructure built with engineering discipline. Every design decision prioritizes security, auditability, and operational reliability.
bulwark.approachStep1Desc: Mapped every attack surface where AI agents interact with sensitive systems — payments, compliance, privacy, and credentials.
bulwark.approachStep2Desc: Designed a pipeline where agents never directly access secrets or tools. Every interaction is mediated, inspected, and logged.
bulwark.approachStep3Desc: 10 independent crates, each owning a security boundary. 487 unit tests ensure correctness at every layer.
bulwark.approachStep4Desc: Apache 2.0 licensed. Transparent, auditable, and community-driven — because security tools must be verifiable.
bulwark.ctaDescription: Bulwark is open-source and ready to deploy. For enterprise deployments, custom policy design, or integration support — Honto's engineering team is here to help.
